week_in_five_points: Higher yields challenged expensive technology shares.
Oil risk eased but did not disappear.
what_mattered: The rate outlook changed valuation assumptions across growth assets.
what_was_noise: Several single-day price moves lacked evidence of lasting business damage.

prediction_scorecard.claim: Higher yields will continue to pressure expensive technology shares.
prediction_scorecard.evidence: The relationship appeared during the week, but the horizon has not finished.
prediction_scorecard.calibration_lesson: A plausible mechanism is not the same as a completed forecast.

regime.inflation: Sticky enough to keep policy restrictive
regime.rates: High and sensitive to inflation news
regime.risk_appetite: Strong in AI suppliers but fragile

historical_update: The 2018 comparison became more useful as higher yields compressed valuations without clear credit stress.
lessons: Separate valuation damage from permanent business damage.
next_week: Watch inflation data, AI revenue evidence, and credit spreads.
